audience_policies.source_phrase: Pass admits 6 people to Franklin Park Zoo (Boston) or Stone Zoo (Stoneham). Discounted rate is $9 per adult; $6 per child. Free admission for children under 2. This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the library. No timed entry tickets necessary.
